title: ComboBoxGroup Class
description: Represents a ComboBoxGroup that contain a menu of options.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create ComboBoxGroup.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of this group.

properties.name: readonly elementHeader: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the element Header of this group..

properties.name: readonly elementText: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the element Text of this group..

properties.name: readonly elementChildren: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the element Children of this group.

properties.name: readonly focused: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the control have input focus.

properties.name: readonly parent?: ComboBox
properties.description: Gets the parent ComboBox of this group.

properties.name: readonly options: ComboBoxOption[]
properties.description: Gets all options within this group.

properties.name: id?: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the id of the group.

properties.name: text: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the group's display text.

properties.name: default: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether this is the default group. Default groups do not display a header.

methods.name: add(item: ComboBoxOption): void
methods.description: Adds a new option to the end of the list for this group.
methods.remarks: This method removes the option from its current parent, if one exists, before adding it to the new group.

methods.name: remove(): void
methods.description: Removes the group from its parent. If it has no parent, calling <mark>remove()</mark> does nothing.
